message:
fix(opencode): use correct SQLite column names (time_created/time_updated)

OpenCode v1.2+ uses time_created/time_updated in its schema, not
created_at/updated_at. This caused prepare failures, making the SQLite
connector silently fall back to flat-file scanning and miss all sessions.

Fixes SQL queries in extract_from_sqlite, load_messages_sqlite, and
load_parts_sqlite. Also updates the SqliteSession struct field names and
corrects all test schemas to match the real OpenCode v1.2+ schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
